visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is issued to those going to Italy send for mission purposes. It is a short term period visa (type "C") for stays up to 90 days or can also be a long term period
                                                                                    visa (type "D") for stays beyond 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Tourist Visa ]

[Table:  Tourist Visa ]

*Only payment by card or cash deposit at bank allowed as mode of payment. EFT is not an accepted method of payment.
- Bank Name: STANDARD BANK
- Branch Code: 012345
- Account Name: VFS Visa Processing SA PTY LTD
- Account Number: 012778842
PLEASE use passport number as reference
Gaborone
Mode of Payment: Debit/Credit Card and Direct deposit of cash into bank account. 
BANKING DETAILS
- Bank Name: First National Bank (FNB)
- Account Name: Cheetah Visa Link (Pty) Ltd
- Branch: Riverbank Plaza
- Account number: 63046378105
- Branch code: 285267
- SWIFT CODE: FIRBBWGX
Please use your passport number as a reference when paying your fee in cash

## Documents Required
IMPORTANT INFORMATION
Please click here for a full list of documentary requirements.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size (45 mm x 35 mm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below  specs to be maintained at 45mm x 35mm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour: 
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - 45 mm x 35 mm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for Schengen visas depends on each individual case. However, applicants should always apply minimum 15 days before the intended journey. This period can be extended up to 45 days should there be any additional documents required or application requires additional investigation.
Applications can be submitted up to 6 months prior to departure date and no earlier.

## Download Forms
Schengen Short Stay Application form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3VnSTStjwh59rT8NpbqEU0/84536e7ebf3651d6f9445137b14ae1b2/Schengen-Harmonised-application-form-JUNE-2024-_Johannesburg-Jurisdiction_.pdf)

The visa is issued to sports people (athletes and trainers) invited to participate in competitions (both professionals and amateurs) only for a short term period
                                                                                                of time, maximum 90 days. The issuance of this visa must be requested by the competent Italian Federation and duly authorized by the Italian National Olympic
                                                                                                Committee (C.O.N.I.). This written authorization must be sent directly by C.O.N.I. to the Consulate General of Italy.
